calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Continued To May-19-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant U.S. Telepacific Corp.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Stay Of Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Kelsey Wong for Defendant.
No other appearances.

DISCUSSED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) RE: Counsel not notifying the court to take this motion off calendar in light of the stipulation lodged on Sept. 25, 2020 nor sending a courtesy copy of the stipulation to the department. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT U.S. TELEPACIFIC CORP.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Stay Of Action: The Court will either adopt the tentative ruling granting the motion or sign the stipulation to submit this matter to binding arbitration and stay court proceedings.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

***joint stipulation and order to submit this matter to binding arbitration and stay court proceedings signed after hearing.***

payments.description: REQ OR STIP AND ORDER W/O HEARING
